channel.title: Projects on Cherry Web Design
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Cherry Web Design

item.title: CameoCraft - Talent Agency
item.description: 01 — Brand Concept & Positioning Cameocraft operates in a dynamic environment that merges entertainment, fandom culture, and live events. The brand identity needed to reflect professionalism while remaining strongly connected to the world of comics, movies, and pop culture conventions. Key objectives included: Create a distinctive and memorable logo Communicate authority in celebrity management Align the visual tone with the energy of comic conventions 02 — Logo Design The logo was developed to balance entertainment appeal and professional credibility.

item.title: Dusk trade - Crypto trade platform
item.description: Disclaimer The platform is currently not publicly available. To request access to the interactive prototype or receive additional project details, please contact me directly. 01 — Product Vision & Strategy The objective was to translate complex blockchain and financial mechanisms into a clear and accessible user experience. Given the highly technical and regulatory-driven context, the visual strategy aimed to balance innovation with institutional credibility. Key goals included: Design a trading interface aligned with financial industry standards Communicate security, transparency, and compliance Create a scalable UI system for future platform evolution 02 — UX & Interface Architecture I worked on structuring dashboards, trading views, and account management flows to ensure clarity and operational efficiency.

item.title: Walltips - Travel experience web-app
item.description: 01 — Product Vision & Strategy The project originated from the idea of simplifying the guest experience while creating a meaningful connection between travelers and local communities. Rather than building a traditional hospitality app, I envisioned a frictionless mini app that could be easily accessed and used without onboarding complexity. The strategic objective was twofold: Enhance the guest experience through clear, centralized information Create a digital showcase for local activities and small independent operators Over time, we added a host-dependent tool into a standalone platform aggregating experiences across the Italian territory.

item.title: Mindtooth - Brain reader
item.description: 01 — Project Vision & Strategy The goal was to translate complex neuroscientific data into a clear, structured, and accessible tablet interface. Given the highly technical nature of EEG readings and brainwave analysis, the design strategy focused on precision, legibility, and ease of interpretation. Key objectives included: Design an interface optimized only for tablet devices Ensure clarity in the visualization of brainwave recordings Support professionals in analysis and monitoring activities 02 — UX & Data Visualization Particular attention was dedicated to information hierarchy and data visualization principles.

item.title: Wall of Fame - Memorabilia
item.description: 01 — Brand Concept & Inspiration The visual identity draws direct inspiration from American cinema culture and celebrity symbolism. The “Wall of Fame” lettering intentionally echoes the iconic Hollywood sign aesthetic, immediately evoking the world of movies, stars, and entertainment heritage. The goal was to create an instant association with: American pop culture Cinema and celebrity mythology Prestige and collectability 02 — Typography & Symbolism The logo combines two distinct typographic languages:

item.title: Furio DiVino - Sommellier
item.description: 01 — Brand Concept & Meaning The identity revolves around the idea of elevating wine to something almost sacred — a refined pleasure, worthy of celebration. The logo visually transforms a stylized red wine glass into a symbolic icon. Key conceptual elements include: A minimal red wine glass as the central symbol A golden-yellow circle forming the rim of the glass, evoking a halo Two stylized wings extending from the sides of the stem The halo and wings subtly suggest the idea of something “divine,” reinforcing the emotional and sensory elevation associated with wine tasting.

item.title: Econeth - Gaming crowfunding web-app
item.description: 01 — Product Vision & Strategy The core vision for Econeth was to balance fun, engagement, and functionality. I aimed to build a platform that would appeal to gamers’ aesthetics while keeping navigation and crowdfunding flows intuitive. The strategic objectives were: Provide an enjoyable, visually immersive experience that resonates with the gaming community Encourage users to interact, contribute, and comment via gamified rewards From the beginning, the focus was on creating a seamless process for users to launch, manage, and modify their crowdfunding pages, ensuring both mobile and desktop experiences were smooth and consistent.

item.title: FUIX - E-commerce
item.description: 01 — Project Vision & Strategy FUIX is a high-end e-commerce platform designed to showcase luxury brands while providing an intuitive and seamless shopping experience. The project aimed to combine elegance, brand identity, and functional clarity to ensure that users could navigate and purchase products effortlessly. The strategic objectives were: Create a visually luxurious yet user-friendly experience Ensure smooth and intuitive user journeys across all purchase stages Collaborate closely with the development team to align design and implementation 02 — UX Research & Concept Development I started by defining wireframes for all key flows, from browsing products to checkout.

item.title: Adalot - Web agency
item.description: 01 — Project Vision & Strategy The core objective of Adalot Networks was to create a corporate website that clearly communicates the company’s services, expertise, and brand identity. The goal was to balance professionalism with an engaging visual experience across all devices. The strategic objectives were: Present Adalot’s services and expertise in a clear, structured way Create a visually appealing interface that engages visitors without compromising usability Ensure full responsiveness from mobile to XL desktop screens 02 — Design & UX Approach I designed mockups and created all internal site graphics, ensuring consistency with Adalot’s brand identity.

item.title: Libes - Social Network Platform
item.description: 01 — Project Vision & Strategy The vision for Libes was to create a social platform that inspires discovery while fostering user-generated content and community participation. The strategic focus was to offer a space where users could share travel experiences, enrich the knowledge base, and explore new destinations in an engaging and responsible way. Key objectives included: Enable ambassadors to create thematic pages for points of interest (POIs) Visualize POIs globally through an interactive homepage map Encourage responsible community contributions to highlight authentic travel insights 02 — UX Research & Concept Development I conducted wireframing and concept design to define user flows for content creation, map interaction, and social engagement.

item.title: Yummo - Food Delivery
item.description: 01 — Project Vision & Strategy The vision for Yummo was to redefine the food delivery experience by making it more than just ordering—it would guide users toward discovering new restaurants and dishes tailored to their preferences. The strategic focus was to combine personalization, location-based suggestions, and user convenience into a seamless experience. Key objectives included: Provide personalized restaurant suggestions based on cravings or location Blend delivery options with local dining inspiration Create a user-friendly interface that engages and guides decision-making 02 — UX Research & Concept Development I worked on early-stage wireframing and concept design to define the core flows, including search, recommendations, and notifications.

item.title: Mio Assicuratore - Insurance broker
item.description: Overview Mio Assicuratore is a platform aimed at simplifying insurance management for both clients and agents. The project focused on creating intuitive, visually appealing interfaces for policy management, onboarding, and customer interactions, ensuring clarity and efficiency throughout the user journey. 01 — Project Vision & Strategy The goal of Mio Assicuratore was to provide a seamless experience for managing insurance policies, from onboarding new clients to purchasing and monitoring coverage.

item.title: da Lele - B&B
item.description: 01 — Brand Concept & Visual Direction The logo was conceived to visually express the essence of a cozy Roman stay. The typographic mark “da Lele” becomes the central identity element, supported by a soft and friendly visual composition. The concept combines: The handwritten-style lettering “da Lele” as the main brand element A coffee cup resting on a soft pillow as a symbolic graphic element The tagline “bed & breakfast” to clearly define the hospitality positioning The coffee cup represents warmth and morning rituals, while the pillow reinforces comfort and rest — together creating an immediate and emotional brand association.

item.title: Defenx - Cybersecurity
item.description: 01 — Project Vision & Strategy The primary goal was to create a corporate website capable of strengthening DEFENX’s brand positioning in the cybersecurity sector. The strategy focused on balancing trust, technical credibility, and accessibility for different target audiences — from enterprise clients to end users. Key objectives included: Communicate security and technological authority through visual design Structure content to clearly explain complex cybersecurity solutions Ensure scalability and easy content management through WordPress 02 — UX & Information Architecture I defined the information architecture and user flows to ensure intuitive navigation across products, solutions, and corporate content.

item.title: Voverc - Cloud Telephone
item.description: 01 — Project Vision & Strategy The objective was to position Voverc as a modern, reliable cloud telephony provider while ensuring that its digital ecosystem reflected simplicity and technological efficiency. Particular attention was given to translating complex telecommunication functionalities into an accessible and intuitive user experience. Key goals included: Design a clear and conversion-oriented corporate website Create an intuitive administration panel for managing cloud PBX features Ensure visual and functional consistency across marketing and product interfaces 02 — UX & Interface Design I designed the information architecture and UI components for both the website and the cloud PBX administration panel.

item.title: HelloLen* Cosplay
item.description: 01 — Project Vision & Strategy The objective of HelloLen* Cosplay was to create a visually immersive portfolio that places imagery and character interpretation at the center of the experience. The website needed to reflect the artistic identity of the cosplayer while remaining clean, fast, and easy to navigate. The strategic goals were: Showcase cosplay and modeling projects through a strong visual-first approach Create a distinctive digital identity aligned with the artist’s personality Ensure a seamless experience across mobile, tablet, and desktop devices 02 — Design & UX Approach The interface was designed without the use of wireframes, allowing for a more instinctive and visually driven creative process.
